message:
Running command: # Check if nc_chipgen has been extended or has verify subcommand
pip show nc-chipgen -v 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
python3 -m nc_chipgen --help 2>&1 | head -30
echo "---"
# Look at what's installed
pip list 2>/dev/null | grep -i "nc\|chip\|verify\|socgen"
